title: Bileswar Temple
tagline: Bileswar Temple — spiritual town of Assam

overview.short: Bilbeswar Devalaya (Assamese: বিল্বেশ্বৰ দেৱালয়) in Belsor, Nalbari, Assam is an ancient Hindu temple and is dedicated to Shiva.
overview.description: Bilbeswar Devalaya (Assamese: বিল্বেশ্বৰ দেৱালয়) in Belsor, Nalbari, Assam is an ancient Hindu temple and is dedicated to Shiva. This temple is believed to have been built 500 years ago. Buffalo sacrifice during Durga Puja is an age-old tradition and ritual in this temple.

topPlaces.name: Batsor
topPlaces.description: Batsor, also Batshar and Batchar is a village in Nalbari district of the Indian state of Western Assam. It is surrounded by Belsor, Churchuri and Goalpara.

topPlaces.name: Billeswar
topPlaces.description: Billeswar is a census village in the Pachim Nalbari subdivision, Nalbari district, Assam, India. As per 2011 census of India, Billeswar village has a population of 2,699 people, including 1,408 males and 1,291 females, and a literacy rate of 76.84%.

topPlaces.name: Chamata
topPlaces.description: Chamata is a village in Nalbari district, in Assam, India. As per 2011 Census of India, Chamata has a population of 6,114 people including 3,102 males and 3,012 females, and with a literacy rate of 81.04%.

topPlaces.name: Jagara, Assam
topPlaces.description: Jagara, commonly known as Jagra, is a census village in Nalbari district, Assam, India. According to the 2011 Census of India, Jagra has a total population of 6,842 people, including 3,586 males and 3,256 females.

topPlaces.name: Darkuchi
topPlaces.description: Darkuchi is a village in Baksa district of Assam, situated on the north bank of the Brahmaputra River.

topPlaces.name: Kochpara
topPlaces.description: Kochpara is a census town in Kamrup district in the Indian state of Assam.

topPlaces.name: Deharkalakuchi
topPlaces.description: Deharkalakuchi is a census village in Nalbari district, Assam, India. As per the 2011 Census of India, Deharkalakuchi has a total population of 2,802 people including 1,435 males and 1,367 females with a literacy rate of 64.85%.

topPlaces.name: Bahjani
topPlaces.description: Bahjani is an urban locality and mouza, in Nalbari district, Assam, India. Bahjani includes the Pub Bahjani, Uttar Bahjani, and Dakshin Bahjani areas, with a total of 25 villages.

items.note: Batsor, also Batshar and Batchar is a village in Nalbari district of the Indian state of Western Assam. It is surrounded by Belsor, Churchuri and Goalpara.

Chamata is a village in Nalbari district, in Assam, India. As per 2011 Census of India, Chamata has a population of 6,114 people including 3,102 males and 3,012 females, and with a literacy rate of 81.04%.

Darkuchi is a village in Baksa district of Assam, situated on the north bank of the Brahmaputra River.
Kochpara is a census town in Kamrup district in the Indian state of Assam.

Deharkalakuchi is a census village in Nalbari district, Assam, India. As per the 2011 Census of India, Deharkalakuchi has a total population of 2,802 people including 1,435 males and 1,367 females with a literacy rate of 64.85%.
Bahjani is an urban locality and mouza, in Nalbari district, Assam, India. Bahjani includes the Pub Bahjani, Uttar Bahjani, and Dakshin Bahjani areas, with a total of 25 villages.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bileswar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bileswar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bileswar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati (38 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (45 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bileswar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bileswar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bileswar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Bileswar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bileswar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Batsor, Billeswar, Chamata, Jagara, Assam, Darkuchi.
